message: Welcome. I am the Timekeeper. That Time of Year has come.
I will inform the town when a holiday or special event begins. Speak with me again to start or end celebrations.
I represent the new years celebration.
Complete tasks for the new years holiday and return for gifts.
Complete tasks for the easter holiday and return for gifts.
I represent the fourth of july celebration.
Complete tasks for the fourth of july holiday and return for gifts.
Complete tasks for the halloween holiday and return for gifts.
Complete tasks for the thanksgiving holiday and return for gifts.
Complete tasks for the christmas holiday and return for gifts.
Complete tasks for the birthday holiday and return for gifts.
Complete tasks for the graduation holiday and return for gifts.
Complete tasks for the wedding holiday and return for gifts.
Complete tasks for the funeral holiday and return for gifts.
I represent the spring festival celebration.
Complete tasks for the spring festival event and return for gifts.
I represent the summer solstice celebration.
Complete tasks for the summer solstice event and return for gifts.
I represent the harvest moon celebration.
Complete tasks for the harvest moon event and return for gifts.
I represent the founders day celebration.
Complete tasks for the founders day event and return for gifts.
